emails.subject: Your Google data has been exported
emails.body_text:
Your account, your data.
We've finished exporting a copy of the Google data you requested on  
April 4, 2026. You can download a copy of your files in Drive.
We exported a copy of your data from:
Voice
View 1 of 2 in Drive  
(https://drive.google.com/file/d/1oOCbe2l_OWGunQ7nqiRPDcn2SwrvFOJ8/view#)
View 2 of 2 in Drive  
(https://drive.google.com/file/d/1QNBNdT-j28Foc4rIX_r9EUReLnsjf3NV/view#)
This message was sent to you because you recently used Google Takeout.  
Learn more (https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/3024190) about how  
to locate, access, and share your data.
  Privacy Policy (https://www.google.com/privacy/privacy-policy.html) |  
Terms of Service (https://www.google.com/accounts/TOS)
